prompt: InvoiceWriter.Persist is intended to atomically store an invoice, its line items, and its outbox event. If any persistence step fails, the original failure must reach the caller, durable state must remain unchanged, the transaction must be rolled back, and the session must always be disposed. Repair the focused failure-path defect without changing the public API. The protected tests inject one deterministic fault at each persistence step and assess observable transaction and resource behavior; do not modify them.
verify_cmd: env HOME=/tmp/csharp-fault-injection-cleanup-home-$$ XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/csharp-fault-injection-cleanup-xdg-$$ DOTNET_CLI_HOME=/tmp/csharp-fault-injection-cleanup-dotnet-home-$$ NUGET_PACKAGES=/tmp/csharp-fault-injection-cleanup-nuget-$$ DOTNET_SKIP_FIRST_TIME_EXPERIENCE=1 DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT=1 DOTNET_NOLOGO=1 dotnet run --project tests/Persistence.ProtectedTests/Persistence.ProtectedTests.csproj --configuration Release --nologo --artifacts-path /tmp/csharp-fault-injection-cleanup-artifacts-$$
